name: Rianna Elenshade-Ironhammer
sd_appearance: Silver-tinted hair pulled tight in a braid, a tall half-elf with eyes of deep brown and emerald green stands in the dim light of the Undercity's Tower of Last Chance. Wearing an immaculate FTA uniform over light armor, she carries a short sword and wears the FTA badge prominently on her chest. A distinctive visual detail is the enchanted plate armor adorning her shoulders, bearing the symbol of the Tower Authority.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: FTA uniform kept immaculate — young, earnest, slightly too eager
